name: @tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli
description: Agnostic runtime CLI for session-lifecycle workflows. Auto-detects namespace from workspace; falls back to 'agent-workflow'. Compatible with qtc-* plugins (auto-detect when .qtc/sessions/ is present). v2.0.0 (RFC 002 Fase D): bundles the agent-workflow-manager skill in the tarball — `self install-skill` defaults to copying from the bundled location instead of git-cloning. Override with `--from <path|url>` for power users.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build

author: Tacuchi <jesus.loayza@quetalcompra.com>
